findings.title: Double cast `as unknown as T`
findings.detail: The cast `state as unknown as T` in `loadRunState` works but is slightly awkward. Since `T extends CoreRunState = RunState` and the on-disk payload is always a full `RunState`, a simple `state as T` would fail to typecheck because TypeScript cannot prove `RunState` is assignable to an arbitrary `T extends CoreRunState`. The double cast is therefore justified, but consider adding a one-line comment explaining that `T` is always a structural subset of the persisted `RunState` at runtime, so readers do not suspect a type-safety hole.

findings.title: REQUIRED_RUN_STATE_FIELDS still includes local-adapter keys
findings.detail: The JSDoc acknowledges this as a deferred follow-up and points to the design.md Open Questions. This is consistent with the proposal's explicit out-of-scope statement (no helper narrowing, no schema split). No change required in this PR; tracked for the follow-up under Epic #127.
